calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Closing Of Estate.
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jodi Phillips for Petitioner.

Ms. Phillips stated that the only asset is a distribution from Robert Noyer's estate (Father) in Alameda County (case # RP 16 819844), that a final order on that estate was signed on August 9th and that until then they did not know how much money was coming into this estate. Ms. Phillips also stated that due to difficulty in communicating with the Client they believed the money was only going to be in the Attorney Client account for a short time, that the costs of opening an estate bank account is not prudent, and that all of the Beneficiaries have received notice and are not objecting. The Court stated that it is the personal representative's duty to place Estate funds in an interest-bearing account and that Counsel should be aware of the law. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
